description: Identity poses; harness contract reference, not a SLAM.
Frame-to-frame point-to-point ICP, voxel 2.0m downsample, brute-force NN, identity init.
Frame-to-frame point-to-point ICP with constant-velocity init (propagate prev Δpose).
Add deterministic kd-tree NN; drop voxel size 2.0m -> 1.0m for ~4x more points per scan.
Sliding-window local map of K=5 recent scans as ICP target (was frame-to-frame).
Two-stage MAX_DIST in ICP: 3.0m on iter 0, 1.5m on subsequent iters.
Sliding-window size K: 5 -> 10 (single-variable ablation).
Sliding-window K: 10 -> 20 (testing monotonicity).
Source voxel 0.5m (was 1.0m); map storage stays at 1.0m. ICP source ~4x denser.
Trimmed ICP: drop worst 20% correspondences by distance from iter 1+.
Adaptive trim: only drop worst 20% if corrs > 40% of source (dense scene). Sparse scenes (highway) keep all.
Skip trim when |prev_delta translation| > 2.0m (highway/fast-motion proxy).
Point-to-plane ICP with k=8 PCA normals; trim block dropped (single-variable change).
Re-introduce motion-aware trim on top of point-to-plane (sort by p2pl residual^2).
Sliding-window K: 20 -> 30 (continue the K-scaling trend).
K: 20 -> 25 (probe between exp0007 K=20 working and exp0014 K=30 timeout).
KISS-ICP-style adaptive correspondence threshold τ = 3σ from constant-velocity deviation δ.
KISS-ICP voxel scheme: map 0.5m (denser), source 1.5m (sparser).
Add Geman-McClure robust kernel to Kabsch update: w_i = κ/(κ+d²)², κ=0.25 m².
Full KISS-ICP recipe minus voxel scheme: adaptive τ + Geman-McClure with κ=(σ_t/3)².
Gentler trim: TRIM_KEEP_FRAC 0.80 -> 0.95 (drop only the worst 5%).
Trim sweep mid-point: 0.90 keep.
Source voxel 0.5m -> 0.4m (denser ICP source on top of exp0020 baseline).
Tr extrinsic perturbed by +0.1° around velo Z (yaw). Calibration angle probe.
Apply KITTI per-point vertical-angle correction (+0.205°) before downsampling. From IMLS-SLAM via KISS-ICP.
KITTI per-point vertical-angle correction (+0.205°) on exp0020 base (source voxel 0.5m, more budget headroom).
Combine scan correction (exp0025) with source voxel 0.4m (exp0022's win). Budget gamble.
MAX_DIST_TIGHT 1.5 → 1.0m on top of scan-corrected base.
Retry point-to-plane ICP on the scan-corrected + tight-gate baseline. Reuses exp0012's p2pl machinery.
MAX_DIST_LOOSE 3.0 → 2.0m. Same logic as exp0027's tighter-tight win.
Retry point-to-plane with NORMAL_K 8 -> 20 (KISS-ICP/IMLS-SLAM-class normal quality).
Add Levenberg-Marquardt damping (multiplicative diagonal, λ=1e-3) to p2pl GN solver.
MAX_DIST_TIGHT 1.0 → 0.7m. Continue the tight-gate trend that won in exp0027.
MAX_DIST_TIGHT 0.7 → 0.5m. Continue the monotonic sweep that won every prior step.
MAX_DIST_TIGHT 0.5 → 0.3m. Sweep continues; this probe likely finds the floor.
3-stage gate schedule: 2.0m loose iter 0, 0.7m mid iter 1, 0.3m fine iter 2+.
MAX_DIST_MID 0.7 → 1.0m. Restore highway iter-1 headroom while keeping fine 0.3m for precision.
Motion-aware tight gate: 0.5m on fast-motion frames (highway), 0.3m on slow (urban).
Structural port of KISS-ICP: voxel hash map, linearized p2p, GM kernel, adaptive τ. First in a 3-5 experiment block.
